ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-16-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Michael Keck, Esq. for Plaintiff: Irene Matthews, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Mitchell Engineering as follows:
Damages $38,000.00
Costs $110.00, for a total of $38,110.00
Judgment signed in open court.
